patch.value: Deliver a single verified modernization branch covering dependency upgrades, Actions upgrades, security findings, source audit, documentation, and pm governance bootstrap.
Consolidate the July 2026 security alert, stale dependencies, failing update automation, and adjacent repository hardening.
Critical advisory closed; dependency and Actions upgrades integrated; CI/security green; pm tracker and history committed; superseded Dependabot PRs reconciled
GitHub alert/PR inventory captured and baseline commands reproduced.
Remove known critical development-tool exposure and restore automated maintenance
One current dependency set with passing Bun and npm validation

value.author: codex-root
value.text: This milestone intentionally absorbs the overlapping open Dependabot PRs into one compatibility-tested change set.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Do not close or supersede Dependabot PRs until the replacement branch is pushed and verified.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Vitest and coverage must move in lockstep to avoid mismatched major versions.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Draft PR #45 opened at https://github.com/unbraind/monica-cli/pull/45 from commit 535451d9cd17cff3e4827a218c70acfc34c7153a; awaiting exact-head CI and security checks.

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Merged PRs #45, #46, and #47. GitHub alert #3 is fixed; eleven superseded legacy update PRs were closed; incompatible PRs #48 and #49 were closed with explicit TypeScript peer-range and Node-runtime rationale.

message: Record merged delivery and dependency reconciliation

author: codex-root

patch.value: Consolidated the critical advisory fix, current compatible dependencies, Bun-native automation, action upgrades, formatter and credential hardening, documentation, and repository governance across merged PRs #45-#47.
Critical advisory closed; automation, CI, and security green; authoritative pm state committed; all dependency PRs reconciled.
GitHub alert #3 is fixed, three delivery PRs merged, all current compatible updates landed, incompatible majors are tracked and suppressed, and every milestone child is terminal with evidence.

message: Close modernization milestone after child closeout
